Flowcharts
docs.text:
graph LR
  A[Start] --> B{Failure?};
  B -->|Yes| C[Investigate...];
  C --> D[Debug];
  D --> B;
  B ---->|No| E[Success!];

docs.title: Sequence Diagrams
docs.text:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Server->>Terminal: Send request
  loop Health
      Terminal->>Terminal: Check for health
  end
  Note right of Terminal: System online
  Terminal-->>Server: Everything is OK
  Terminal->>Database: Request customer data
  Database-->>Terminal: Customer data

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Draw.io provides various tools to create and modify shapes while creating diagrams from scratch. This guide provides information on several methods on how to deal with shapes. Starting from the basics of shapes and providing some advanced tips and tricks, you will be able to save the file and view the final result.

docs.title: How to Save and Export a Diagram
Step 1: Finish the Diagram
docs.text: Make sure your diagram is complete before exporting it.

docs.title: Step 2: Check for Errors
docs.text: Review the diagram for any spelling mistakes, missing labels, incorrect connections, or formatting issues.

docs.title: Step 3: Click File
docs.text: Click the File menu in the top-left corner of the screen.

docs.title: Step 4: Click Export As
docs.text: From the File menu, select Export As.

docs.title: Step 5: Choose the File Type
docs.text:
Select the file type you want to export.

Recommendation:

Export your diagram as a PDF unless your instructor asks for a different file type.

docs.title: Step 6: Choose Fit to
docs.text: Adjust the export settings if needed, including the Fit to option.

docs.title: Step 7: Name the File
docs.text: Enter a clear and appropriate file name.

docs.title: Step 8: Choose Download
docs.text: Click the dropdown menu and choose Download.

docs.title: Step 9: Click Save
docs.text: Click Save to begin exporting the file.

docs.title: Step 10: Wait for the Download
docs.text:
A new tab may open during the export process.

Note:

Do not close the new tab right away. Wait until you see the download notification in the top-right corner of your browser.

docs.title: Step 11: Open the Final File
docs.text: Open the exported file to make sure it downloaded correctly and looks the way you expected.
